summary: Lane DEEP-RESOURCE-CLEANUP: Audited error-path resource leaks, scope management, connection lifecycle, and timer hygiene across 5 target files. Fixed 3 resource leaks (ws.ts leaked error listeners, db.duckdb.ts abort handler skipped cleanup, oauth-callback.ts socket not destroyed on error path). All fixes verified via typecheck (pass, 0 new errors). Scope management audit confirmed 0 critical scope leaks across 60+ Effect.scoped/addFinalizer/ensuring usages. Connection lifecycle and timer hygiene audits confirmed clean patterns.
